title: arrhenatherum avenaceum var. bulbosum
intro: Arrhenatherum avenaceum var. bulbosum, also known as bulbous oat-grass, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the grass family (Poaceae). It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues and alleviate menstrual cramps. The health benefits of Arrhenatherum avenaceum var. bulbosum include its ability to ease respiratory problems, calm nervous tension, and promote relaxation. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and made into teas, tinctures, or infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
